products.name: Dyson V15 Detect
products.verdict: The smartest vacuum ever made — a laser reveals hidden dust and a sensor counts particles in real time.
products.description: The Dyson V15 Detect is the pinnacle of cordless vacuum engineering. A green laser in the fluffy cleaner head illuminates microscopic dust you'd never see, while a piezo sensor counts and categorizes particles in real time — showing exactly how dirty your floor was and when it's truly clean. 240 AW of suction, up to 60 minutes of runtime, and automatic suction adjustment based on dust detection make it the most intelligent vacuum available.
pros: Laser dust reveal is genuinely useful
Particle counter proves when floors are clean
Strongest suction of any Dyson cordless
cons: Heavy at 6.8 lbs for extended use
Bin capacity is small — frequent emptying

products.name: Samsung Bespoke Jet AI
products.verdict: The most complete package — powerful suction, auto-empty station, and AI-powered cleaning intelligence.
products.description: The Samsung Bespoke Jet AI is the all-in-one cordless vacuum system. It pairs 280W of suction with an included Clean Station that auto-empties the dustbin, so you go weeks without touching dirt. AI-powered sensors detect floor type and adjust suction automatically, and the digital display shows battery, suction level, and filter status. Two batteries are included for up to 2 hours of total runtime. It's the closest thing to a self-managing vacuum.
cons: Clean Station takes up floor space

products.name: Tineco Floor One S5
products.verdict: The best wet-dry vacuum — vacuums and mops simultaneously for sparkling hard floors.
products.description: The Tineco Floor One S5 isn't just a vacuum — it's a wet-dry floor washer that vacuums and mops in a single pass. iLoop smart sensors detect dirty spots and automatically boost suction and water flow, while the self-cleaning cycle cleans the brush roller and tubes after each use. It's purpose-built for hard floors (tile, hardwood, laminate) and delivers results that a regular vacuum plus a separate mop can't match.
pros: Vacuums and mops in one pass — huge time saver
iLoop sensor auto-boosts on dirty spots
cons: Not for carpet — hard floors only
Heavy at 10.3 lbs when filled with water
Replacement brush rollers are an ongoing cost

products.name: Shark Stratos Cordless
products.verdict: The best anti-odor vacuum — Clean Sense IQ and anti-odor technology keep your vacuum and home fresh.
products.description: The Shark Stratos Cordless introduces odor-neutralizing technology that other vacuums ignore. Its anti-odor cartridge actively neutralizes odors trapped in the vacuum, while Clean Sense IQ automatically detects hidden debris and boosts suction. DuoClean PowerFins combines a soft roller and bristle brush for both hard floors and carpet, and up to 60 minutes of runtime handles large homes. It's the vacuum for pet owners and anyone tired of smelly dustbins.
pros: Anti-odor tech is a unique and welcome feature
Clean Sense IQ boosts suction when needed
DuoClean works on all floor types
cons: Suction not quite as strong as Dyson V15
Bin is small for a full-home clean

products.name: LG CordZero A9 Kompressor
products.verdict: The most hygienic vacuum — Kompressor technology compresses dust for 2.4x more bin capacity.
products.description: The LG CordZero A9 Kompressor solves the small-bin problem that plagues cordless vacuums. Its unique Kompressor technology physically compresses dust and debris inside the bin, fitting 2.4x more before you need to empty it. Two swappable batteries deliver up to 120 minutes of total runtime, and the Aqua Spinner mop attachment adds wet cleaning capability. Power Drive Nozzle automatically adjusts suction for carpet and hard floors.
pros: Kompressor means far fewer bin empties
cons: Suction is good but not class-leading
Mop attachment is basic compared to Tineco
Brand is less recognized in vacuums

products.name: Dyson V8
products.verdict: The best value Dyson — proven performance and whole-machine HEPA filtration at the lowest Dyson price.
products.description: The Dyson V8 is the entry point into Dyson's cordless lineup and it's all most people need. Whole-machine HEPA filtration captures 99.99% of particles, the direct-drive cleaner head digs deep into carpet, and 40 minutes of runtime handles apartments and small homes. At $349, it delivers the Dyson engineering and build quality without the flagship price. It's the smart Dyson for budget-conscious buyers.
pros: Real Dyson quality at the lowest price
Converts to handheld for quick jobs
cons: Bin is tiny — frequent emptying required

products.name: Samsung Jet 75 Pet
products.verdict: The best pet hair vacuum — turbo brush and strong suction tackle embedded fur on every surface.
products.description: The Samsung Jet 75 Pet is built specifically for pet households. Its turbo action brush with anti-tangle technology powers through pet hair on carpets, upholstery, and hard floors without wrapping around the roller. 200W of suction and a long-lasting removable battery deliver up to 60 minutes of cleaning. The lightweight 6 lb body and included pet multi-tool and mini motorized brush make reaching every fur-covered corner easy.
pros: Anti-tangle brush is a must for pet owners
cons: Filtration is good but not HEPA-certified

products.name: Dreame R20
products.verdict: The best value high-suction vacuum — 150 AW and a hair-tangle-free brush at a mid-range price.
products.description: The Dreame R20 punches above its weight with 150 AW of suction — matching vacuums twice its price. The anti-tangle brush roller uses a V-shaped design that flings hair off instead of wrapping, and the HD color display shows battery, mode, and maintenance info. Up to 90 minutes of runtime on a single charge handles even large homes, and the included accessories cover everything from crevices to mattresses.
pros: 150 AW suction at $329 is outstanding value
HD display is informative and clear
cons: Brand is less recognized than Dyson/Shark

products.name: Bissell ICONpet Turbo Edge
products.verdict: The edge-cleaning specialist — unique EdgeReach design gets into corners other vacuums miss.
products.description: The Bissell ICONpet Turbo Edge focuses on what most vacuums neglect: edges and corners. Its unique EdgeReach foot design allows the brush roller to extend to the very edge of the vacuum head, cleaning right up against walls and baseboards. The tangle-free brush roll handles pet hair, 30 minutes of fade-free suction provides consistent power, and every purchase helps fund Bissell's pet rescue foundation. It's the vacuum for detail-oriented cleaners.
pros: Edge cleaning is noticeably better than competitors
Tangle-free brush handles pet hair well
cons: Suction is adequate but not class-leading
Not as versatile as multi-floor competitors

products.name: Eureka RapidClean Pro
products.verdict: The best ultra-budget stick vacuum — lightweight, capable, and under $130 for quick daily cleanups.
products.description: The Eureka RapidClean Pro is proof that a good cordless vacuum doesn't need to cost $500. At just $129 and 5.2 lbs, it's light enough for anyone to use comfortably. LED headlights illuminate dust, the high-efficiency brush roll handles both hard floors and low-pile carpet, and up to 40 minutes of runtime covers small to mid-size homes. It's not fancy, but for daily quick cleanups or as a secondary vacuum, the value is unmatched.
pros: 5.2 lbs is one of the lightest available
Good enough for daily quick cleans
cons: Suction can't compete with premium brands
